action.reasoning: Observation: The source code of NeRFRenderer._forward shows a bug in TripoSR where `rays_o` and `rays_d` are not indexed by `rays_valid` when computing `xyz`, causing a tensor size mismatch if any ray misses the bounding box. Analysis: I will monkey-patch `NeRFRenderer._forward` in `predict.py` to correctly index `rays_o` and `rays_d` with `rays_valid`. This will fix the crash and allow the eval to complete. Decision: Write the updated `predict.py` with the monkey-patch, run a quick local test, and submit an eval to finally get the true baseline LPIPS.
